name: compliance closed-loop validation verifies the AI provenance manifest carries the controls_consulted block
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/closed-loop-validate.sh" --synthetic-framework test-fw --provenance-out .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/test-commit.json 2>out.txt && grep -q '"controls_consulted"' .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/test-commit.json && grep -q 'verify=manifest_controls_consulted' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
